title: Simply Lunar Optimized
description: This a fork of Simply Optimized for Lunar Client because stock Lunar Client is not enough.
body:
# Simply Lunar Optimized

### Because Lunar Client is not enough.

I have been struggling with performance on my old MacBook (2017 Air) and I tried using Lunar Client. I loved it but the performance was still not enough. I noticed that Simply Optimized got a simmilar performance to Lunar Client, but it did not have the stuff I wanted on Lunar. 

Came born this modpack, the child of Lunar Client and Simply Optimized! For the most performance possible and for all the peoples.

This just removes the mods that are not compatible with Lunar Client such as C2ME and Immediatelyfast. Also adds some other mods such as Debugify, and Krypton.
